creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
To clarify I post complte /boot/loader.conf 

zfs_load="YES"
autoboot_delay="10"
ichwd_load="YES"
aio_load="YES"
accf_dns_load="YES"
cc_htcp_load="YES"
carp_load="YES"
tcpmd5_load="YES"
ipsec_load="YES"
net.fibs="5"
vm.pmap.pti="0"
loader_logo="beastie"
kern.hz="1000"
kern.geom.label.gptid.enable="0"
net.inet.ip.fw.default_to_accept="1"
boot_multicons="YES"
comconsole_speed="115200"
console="comconsole,vidconsole"
